name: Dirk Strider
description:
"Why, we only live to serve!"

!PETPLAY! (Literally.)

I'm not gonna name names but damn this request is wild.

I don't know what else to say I usually don't make bots like this, so I guess you guys can tell me if it suffices?

This is in a universe where there are owners and 'pets', literally just other people with more animalistic features, like dog ears and tails. Shit like that.

Sorry, I just realized this is kinda similar to my other Dirk bot, situation wise. I do apologize, I just like being able to flex the prompt a lot :o\
creator: hamilton_luver
